history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, styled hair takes a mirror selfie. He is wearing a black hoodie with colorful, intricate designs on the sleeves and chest. The designs appear to be crosses and gothic-style lettering. The hoodie is also adorned with a large white graphic print on the lower front. He is holding a modern smartphone in his right hand, obscuring part of his face. His left hand is held up, with fingers extended. He is wearing a small earring in his left ear.

The background consists of a white wall and a dark-colored door, slightly ajar, which is reflected in the mirror. The mirror itself has an irregular, wavy black frame, giving it a unique, organic shape. The reflection captures the man and the doorway behind him. The lighting is relatively soft, creating some shadows but clearly illuminating the subject and the details of his clothing. The overall mood is casual and stylish, with a hint of urban streetwear aesthetic. The color palette is dominated by black and white, with vibrant accents from the hoodie's graphics. The floor in the foreground appears to be made of textured, speckled concrete or stone.
